title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF ITAWES AGRICULTURAL COLLEGE IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF PIAT, PROVINCE OF CAGAYAN, TO THE NORTHERN LUZON STATE COLLEGE OF AGRICULTURE.

chunks.text:
H. No. 451 / 65 OG No. 6, 1268 (February 10, 1969)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 4893, June 17, 1967 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF ITAWES AGRICULTURAL COLLEGE IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF PIAT, PROVINCE OF CAGAYAN, TO THE NORTHERN LUZON STATE COLLEGE OF AGRICULTURE.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of Itawes Agricultural College in the Municipality of Piat, Province of Cagayan, is hereby changed to the Northern Luzon State College of Agriculture.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 17, 1967.
